title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono, Founding Mathematician at Axiom Math, argues that humans cannot win a race competing with AI on knowledge. He contends that true intelligence in the age of AI is defined by curiosity and human judgment rather than knowledge accumulation, drawing lessons from mathematician Ramanujan's legacy.
